title: Recursive Prompt Engineering
scenario:
Create a recursive prompt to extract a list of nested JSON objects, where each object has a 'name' and a 'children' property. The prompt should be able to handle an arbitrary number of recursion levels and extract the 'name' of each object. The output should be a list of extracted names, one per line, in the format: 'name1
name2
...'.
constraints: Must be able to handle up to 10 recursion levels
Must use a prompt that can be generalized to any JSON structure

evaluationCriteria.description: The output JSON is syntactically valid and correctly formatted
The list of extracted names matches the expected output
The prompt can be generalized to any JSON structure
